instruction: The Instagram logo is oversized, tinted, and duplicated slightly off-center. Keep one normal outline logo.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/instagram.svg" transform="translate(2, 2) scale(5.1667)" style="color: #ec4899" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5" ry="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></g>
  <g id="icon-dup" data-source="feather/instagram.svg" transform="translate(-6, 10) scale(5.1667)" style="color: #ec4899" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5" ry="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/instagram.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5" ry="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></g>
</svg>
